context.audience: Content marketers and SEO practitioners using AI for writing at scale, developers building content generation pipelines, indie makers creating AI-powered writing tools and platforms
pain_points: Generating content that passes AI detection and reads naturally to humans

Building reliable content pipelines that handle generation, validation, and publishing

Legal and ethical considerations of AI-generated content at scale
monetization: AI writing tool and platform products
content_that_works: SEO for AI content strategy articles
subtopics: AI content quality and editing workflows
